title: dryopteris gongylodes var. propinqua
intro: Dryopteris gongylodes var. propinqua is a variant of the Dryopteris gongylodes fern species, commonly known as the "wood fern." This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris gongylodes var. propinqua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
